name: BankID (Sweden) e-Signature
description: Swedish BankID eID provider, contributed into esign:provider — sandboxed. BankID's RP API requires mutual-TLS with a client certificate, which the sandbox egress cannot perform; this provider surfaces SE in the picker but the auth/collect flow is not available in-sandbox (mirrors the built-in shell adapter).

settings.label: BankID RP Base URL
settings.help: BankID Relying Party API base URL (mTLS endpoint).
